title: Full Shot Highly Detailed Luxury 3D Render
sourceTitle: Full Shot Highly Detailed Luxury 3D Render

imagePrompts.prompt:
A full shot, highly detailed luxury 3D render of the woman with the reference face and body from the image, posing confidently beside a monumental glowing X logo crafted from translucent spectral black titanium, polished chrome with phantom engravings, and animated electric-blue energy lines intertwined with swirling ghostly mists and faint apparitions.

She wears her signature navy blue long-sleeve button-up blouse with subtle ethereal transparency and glowing edges, tucked into a sleek form-fitting black pencil skirt with a thin black belt and gold buckle, paired with black pointed heels and delicate gold jewelry, giving her a professional yet haunting ghost-trendsetter presence.

Her posture is elegant and powerful, one hand holding a smartphone displaying a viral “Below Minimum Earning (BME)” trend post while the other rests casually against the illuminated X logo.

The environment is a futuristic rooftop media studio overlooking a neon-lit smart city at night infused with strong ghost vibes, with holographic engagement graphs flickering like spirits, floating repost icons appearing as apparitions, AI trend dashboards with spectral data streams, and dynamic ethereal energy swirls surrounding the platform.

She stands on a glossy black reflective floor with integrated LED accents and dense volumetric ghostly fog effects for cinematic depth and mystery. At the front of the platform, a premium glowing metal nameplate reads: “AMY GHOST — Trendsetter of Below Minimum Earning BME.”

The lighting is sleek and dramatic with cool blue highlights, silver reflections, luxurious cyber-modern aesthetics blended with haunting ghostly glows and soft phantom particles, creating a bold, influential, and mysteriously powerful social media presence on X. The atmosphere feels ethereal, trendy, cinematic, and unmistakably ghost-vibed — the ultimate trendsetter of Below Minimum Earning dominating the platform.
